CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident has an obvious or likely cavity or broken natural teeth. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
404 L0200E_INFLMD_GUM_CD L0200E_INFLMD_GUM_CD L0200E Dental Status: Inflamed Gum Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident has inflamed or bleeding gums or loose natural teeth. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
